subject: Public Health
title: SDG 6: Clean Water and Sanitation
description: A tiny lesson with a big payoff: SDG 6: Clean Water and Sanitation.

hook.text: Sustainable Development Goal 6 promises clean water and sanitation for all by 2030. The world is off track.

buildup.text: SDG 6 targets universal access to safe drinking water, sanitation, and hygiene with reduced inequalities.

discovery.text: At current rates, 1.6 billion people will still lack safely managed water in 2030.

twist.text: Achieving SDG 6 would require tripling current investment levels—about $114 billion per year.

climax.text: WASH underpins nearly every other SDG—health, education, gender equality, and economic growth all depend on it.

punchline.text: Without water and sanitation, no other development goal is achievable.

quiz.question: How much annual investment would achieving SDG 6 require?
